rawAssistant: I'm not sure what you're referring to, but I've been tending to the Travelers who come through Hollowfen for as long as I can remember. The weight of my years is etched on my face, but a warm smile always seems to find its way onto it when someone needs help. As a healer, I've learned to listen more than speak, and to know just what words will ease the worries of those who come to me.
